message:
feat(nn): expose EmbeddingBag and MaxUnpool field accessors, remove dead_code suppression

- EmbeddingBag: add num_embeddings(), embedding_dim(), mode() public
  accessors and remove #[allow(dead_code)] from num_embeddings field
  now that it is used by the getter
- MaxUnpool1d: add kernel_size(), stride() accessors; remove dead_code
  suppression from kernel_size and stride fields
- MaxUnpool2d: add kernel_size() -> (h, w), stride() -> (h, w)
  accessors; remove dead_code suppression from all 4 fields
- MaxUnpool3d: add kernel_size() -> (d, h, w), stride() -> (d, h, w)
  accessors; remove dead_code suppression from all 6 fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
